response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages including Python, JavaScript, and DLang, and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and low-latency systems
Proven track record in building scalable, distributed systems and open-source infrastructure
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and cross-team tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation or feature-flagging platforms
Lacks documented experience with telemetry, guardrails, or statistical analysis for growth systems
Limited visibility into AI tooling usage to accelerate engineering velocity as preferred
